canonical.message: Mock HTTP canonical evidence ended on a different host.

dnssec.message: DNSSEC validation is not checked by ShipReady DNS readiness v1.

caa.message: No CAA records were observed by the configured resolver.

searchConsoleTxt.message: No expected Search Console TXT token was provided.

verdict.summary: DNS address resolution appears present, but an optional readiness check needs attention.

limitations: Deterministic mock DNS data only; no live DNS resolver or provider API was used.
DNS readiness is advisory evidence only and does not guarantee propagation, certificate issuance, crawling, indexing, ranking, or third-party approval.
Registrable-domain derivation is conservative and does not use a public suffix list in v1.
HTTP canonical evidence is adjacent to DNS and may vary by cache, redirect policy, or application behavior.
Search Console TXT verification readiness was not checked because no expected token was provided.
nextActions: Review application redirects or canonical host settings outside the DNS readiness command.
